title: Can Tho、Can Tho — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Can Tho、Can Thoの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Can ThoはCan Thoにある人口1,250,000の都市です。The largest city in the Mekong Delta, known for its floating markets, canal networks, and very low cost of living, offering an authentic Vietnamese experience.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
